title: Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa
tagline: Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa — spiritual town of Bihar

overview.short: Khudneshwar Asthan is a Hindu temple devoted to Lord Shiva located 17 kilometers southwest of the Samastipur district headquarters of Bihar, India.
overview.description: Khudneshwar Asthan is a Hindu temple devoted to Lord Shiva located 17 kilometers southwest of the Samastipur district headquarters of Bihar, India. The name of the temple was inherited from a Muslim woman named Khudni who found the Lingam at this location and became a devotee of Lord Shiva. Her mortal remains were buried one yard south beside the Lingam under the same temple roof.

topPlaces.name: Musrigharari
topPlaces.description: Musrigharari is a small town and Nagar Panchayat in Samastipur district of Bihar, India. Musrigharari is located at an approximate distance of 8 kilometers from the city of Samastipur.

topPlaces.name: Tajpur, Bihar
topPlaces.description: Tajpur is a town and community development block (C.D. block) in Samastipur district of the Indian state of Bihar. It serves as the headquarters of the Tajpur block and is administered as a Nagar Parishad.

topPlaces.name: Sarairanjan
topPlaces.description: Sarairanjan is a town in the Sarairanjan (Vidhan Sabha constituency) in Samastipur district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is located on the musrigharari - Vidyapati Nagar road.

topPlaces.name: Khalispur, Samastipur
topPlaces.description: Khalispur is a village in the Sarairanjan block, Samastipur district, of the Indian state of Bihar.

items.note: Musrigharari is a small town and Nagar Panchayat in Samastipur district of Bihar, India. Musrigharari is located at an approximate distance of 8 kilometers from the city of Samastipur.

Tajpur is a town and community development block (C.D. block) in Samastipur district of the Indian state of Bihar. It serves as the headquarters of the Tajpur block and is administered as a Nagar Parishad.
Sarairanjan is a town in the Sarairanjan (Vidhan Sabha constituency) in Samastipur district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is located on the musrigharari - Vidyapati Nagar road.
Khalispur is a village in the Sarairanjan block, Samastipur district, of the Indian state of Bihar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (65 km) and the nearest railway station is Muzaffarpur Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa?
faq.a: Stays in Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khudneshwar Asthan Morwa?
faq.a: The top attractions are Musrigharari, Tajpur, Bihar, Sarairanjan, Khalispur, Samastipur.
